case_title: SAMY SHEW VS. CAMILLE ROSHNI PATEL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEW, SAMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATEL, CAMILLE ROSHNI $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $460.00, *COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT SOLD PLAINTIFF A VEHICLE THAT WAS DEFECTIVE. HOWEVER PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH DAMAGES BEYOND THAT AWARDED IN THIS JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDOANLD FILED BY SHEW, SAMY PATEL, CAMILLE ROSHNI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-04-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, CAMILLE ROSHNI
